## AbstractModelClass.insertMany() method

Inserts multiple documents into the database.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static insertMany(docs: any[], options?: QueryInsertOneOptions): Promise<any>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

docs


</td><td>

any\[\]


</td><td>

An array of documents to be inserted into the database.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

QueryInsertOneOptions


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional settings for the insertMany operation.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;any&gt;

A promise that resolves with an array of results for each document insertion. Each result will either be the inserted document (including any default values and generated keys) or an error if the insertion failed for that document.

## Remarks

Nested schema values will not be saved to its corresponding object stores.

## Example


```ts
const users = await UserModel.insertMany([
  { name: 'John', age: 30 },
  { name: 'Jane', age: 25 },
]);
console.log(users);
```
